data.body: ROUND-3 review + final WS2 fix: ALL 12 tickets (epic cite-stone-sea + WS1-WS11) now PASS, zero blocking / zero indeterminate / zero verify_failed. Progression across rounds: R1 (pre-fix) all-INDETERMINATE (headroom bug); R2 (post headroom-fix, pre-remediation) 8 PASS + 3 BLOCK (WS2:2, WS3:2, WS10:1); R3 (post round-2 remediation) 11 PASS + WS2:1 BLOCK; final WS2 fix (dedup made a rubric-level AC-clause suppression in plan_review_hedge.md instead of a nonexistent location-based pipeline dedup) -> WS2 PASS. WS3 (redesigned to LLM-routed overlay criteria) and WS10 (deep-link base URL specified) cleared their BLOCKs in R3; WS11 (Chesterton's Fence) passed clean on first review. Remaining per-ticket advisories are non-blocking coaching (mostly proving-command-precision nits to resolve at implementation time); gate posture is coach-not-block. Reviews run --no-sign (design tickets, not being claimed yet).
